questions.question: Explain the principle of least privilege and why it's important in cloud security.
expectedPoints: Definition: Minimum access necessary for functions

questions.question: Compare and contrast the shared responsibility model for IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS cloud service models.
expectedPoints: IaaS: Provider responsible for infrastructure, customer for OS, apps, data
PaaS: Provider handles runtime, middleware, OS; customer manages applications and data
SaaS: Provider manages everything except data and user access
Security responsibility shifts increasingly to provider from IaaS to SaaS
